query:
UPDATE services SET 
  shortDescription = CASE 
    WHEN slug = 'architectural-bim' THEN 'Expert BIM coordination for seamless multi-discipline integration'
    WHEN slug = 'mepf-design' THEN 'Complete mechanical, electrical, and plumbing design solutions'
    WHEN slug = '3d-visualization' THEN 'Stunning 3D renderings and visualizations for your projects'
    ELSE shortDescription
  END,
  description = CASE
    WHEN slug = 'architectural-bim' THEN 'Our architectural BIM services provide comprehensive 3D modeling and coordination for building designs. From conceptual design through construction documentation, we deliver precise Revit models with LOD 100-500 accuracy. Our team ensures seamless integration of architectural elements with structural and MEP systems, preventing costly conflicts and rework. We specialize in multi-discipline coordination, clash detection, and detailed construction documentation that streamlines the entire project delivery process.'
    WHEN slug = 'mepf-design' THEN 'Complete mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and fire protection design solutions using advanced BIM technology. Our MEPF services include comprehensive system design, 3D modeling, coordination, and detailed shop drawings. We create integrated BIM models that coordinate all building systems for optimal performance and constructability. Our expertise covers HVAC design, electrical distribution, plumbing layout, and fire protection systems with full coordination and clash resolution to ensure efficient installation and operation.'
    WHEN slug = '3d-visualization' THEN 'Stunning 3D visualizations and renderings that bring your projects to life. Our visualization services include photorealistic renderings, walkthrough animations, and interactive presentations. Perfect for client presentations, marketing materials, and design validation. We create compelling visual narratives that help stakeholders understand your design vision, make informed decisions, and gain confidence in the project before construction begins.'
    ELSE description
  END
WHERE slug IN ('architectural-bim', 'mepf-design', '3d-visualization');
